description_long: This handbag features a woven straw or rattan body with a natural beige color, complemented by brown leather or faux leather trim along the top edge and corners. The bag has a rectangular, slightly tapered shape with a flat base, providing structure and stability. Two long, slender straps are attached at the sides, allowing for shoulder or crossbody wear. The woven texture of the main body gives it a rustic, artisanal appearance, while the leather accents add durability and a touch of sophistication. There are no visible external pockets, closures, or decorative elements, resulting in a clean and minimalist design. The interior is not visible, but it is likely lined with fabric or a similar material for added protection.
description: A rectangular woven straw handbag with brown leather trim and long shoulder straps, featuring a minimalist and natural design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full woven body, brown leather trim at the top and corners, and both straps resting on top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the slim profile of the bag and the thickness of the leather trim at the base and top.
description_view_2: Back view is nearly identical to the front, displaying the woven texture and leather accents, with straps visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the way the leather trim wraps around the edges.
attribute_strap_type: Two long, fixed shoulder or crossbody straps made of brown leather, attached at the sides.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Not visible; likely an open top or concealed magnetic snap or zipper under the leather trim.
attribute_pattern: Woven basket-like pattern formed by the straw material.
